name: Hari Ini Kenapa, Naira?
overview:
Today Why Naira, tells the love story of a couple of different faiths.In many cases, love stories of different beliefs will end in painful separations.

Naira, played by Prilly Latuconsina, is a Muslim and Adrian, played by Bryan Domani, is a Christian, and their relationship has been going on for 4 years.

Naira and Adrian's relationship has reached a point where holding on and letting go is both painful.

In the midst of love problems, different beliefs between Naira and Adrian are present in their midst, Rakha, played by Irzan Faiq.
